title: Vanilla Armor Upgrades+
body:
# 🛡️ Vanilla Armor Upgrades+
### A Lightweight mod that bridges the gap between armor tiers!

Tired of speedrunning from Iron to Diamond in a single session? Vanilla Armor Upgrades+ overhauls Minecraft’s progression system by introducing armor upgrade for each armor tier.

```
Mod made for an Upcoming SMP of mine.
```

## 🛠️ Key Features
1. 🛡️ Expanded Armor Tiers: Every material from Leather to Diamond, now requires armor upgrade to proceed to thee next tier


1. 🛡️ Staggered Progression: Experience a more rewarding "grind." You’ll need to master your current tier before moving to the next, making that eventual set of Diamond armor feel like a true achievement.

1. 🛡️ Better Smithing Table: Removes the ability to craft armors from crafting table, to encourage the usage of smithing table.

1. 🛡️ Craftable Chainmail Armor: Introduces Chainmail into the Armor ecosystem by making it possible to craft and a requirement to proceed to Iron Armor.


JEI (Just Enough Items) - https://modrinth.com/mod/jei
Meant to be played with Better Gold Equipment - https://modrinth.com/mod/better-gold-equipment
